confidence_note: Best starting point. Public CycPeptMPDB-derived CSV has 7451 rows; local check found 6941 PAMPA, 649 Caco2, 40 MDCK, 186 RRCK non-null entries.
notes: Use as peptide_sample_table backbone; pair construction requires source-wise SAR grouping.

confidence_note: Database paper reports 7334 cyclic peptides from 45 papers and 2 patents; useful for citation and source provenance.
notes: Use to justify dataset origin and HELM representation.

confidence_note: Processed CycPeptMPDB data and monomer_table are available; README reports dedup all 7451->7337 and PAMPA 6941->6889.
notes: Use for raw CSV, monomer correspondence table, baseline comparison and split indices.

confidence_note: Benchmark of 13 ML/DL methods with random and scaffold split; useful for baselines and split protocol.
notes: Use as baseline reference, not as primary source for edit labels.

confidence_note: Largest source in public CSV. Rough shadow grouping found 3060 samples in groups with >=2 members and max shadow group size 184.
notes: Top priority for matched edit-pair mining.

confidence_note: Second largest source. Rough shadow grouping found 1388 samples in groups with >=2 members and max shadow group size 186.
notes: Top priority; likely many same-scaffold variants.

confidence_note: Large PAMPA source with 688 PAMPA and 8 Caco2 entries. Rough shadow grouping found 306 samples in repeated shadow groups.
notes: Good second wave after Townsend/Kelly.

confidence_note: Large source, but rough shadow grouping only found 30 samples in repeated shadow groups with current simple mapping.
notes: Use mainly for absolute prediction unless manual series annotation reveals more pairs.

confidence_note: Caco2-heavy source with 374 Caco2 entries; rough shadow grouping found 49 samples in repeated groups.
notes: Useful for secondary assay and external validation, not first PAMPA MVP.

confidence_note: Small but strong candidate: 62 PAMPA and 62 Caco2 entries; rough shadow grouping found 41 samples in repeated groups.
notes: High-value manually curated SAR set.

confidence_note: 136 rows, 133 PAMPA and 40 Caco2 entries; rough shadow grouping currently weak.
notes: Use after high-priority sources.

confidence_note: 52 PAMPA and 5 Caco2 entries; rough shadow grouping found 20 samples in repeated groups.
notes: Potential small SAR set.

confidence_note: 47 PAMPA and 39 Caco2 entries; rough shadow grouping found 17 samples in repeated groups.
notes: Potential dual-assay matched set.

confidence_note: Small Caco2 source; rough shadow grouping found 16 samples in repeated groups.
notes: Useful for manual examples and Caco2 validation.

confidence_note: 81 rows, 72 PAMPA; rough shadow grouping currently found 8 repeated-shadow samples.
notes: Potential single-source series after manual check.

confidence_note: Cyclic peptide knowledge base with sequence/structure conversion and monomer reference library; not a permeability source.
notes: Auxiliary source for monomer dictionary and structure conversion.

confidence_note: NRP database useful for noncanonical monomer names and natural cyclic peptide scaffolds; not permeability-labeled.
notes: Auxiliary monomer/scaffold reference.

confidence_note: Useful for monomer nomenclature, attachment points and HELM-compatible representation.
notes: Auxiliary for monomer_anchor_table, not peptide property labels.

confidence_note: Nonpeptidic macrocycle permeability database with 5638 datapoints; outside main cyclic peptide scope.
notes: Possible negative/contrastive macrocycle auxiliary source, not MVP.

confidence_note: Current website states version 1.2 contains 7991 structurally diverse cyclic peptides from 56 publications.
notes: Check whether newer web export differs from the public GitHub CSV before freezing v1 dataset.

confidence_note: Manually curated CPP database; paper reports around 1850 entries and explicitly records chemical modifications such as non-natural residues, linkers and lipid moieties.
notes: Auxiliary uptake/cell-penetration labels only; not directly comparable with passive permeability.

confidence_note: Prediction server/repository for CPP design trained on experimentally validated CPP data.
notes: Use only as historical CPP benchmark or negative/positive sequence source after license check.

confidence_note: Manually curated database; NAR paper reports about 3000 entries and about 2000 unique peptides evaluated on erythrocytes from 17 sources.
notes: Good auxiliary toxicity label source; assay conditions and concentrations must be normalized carefully.

confidence_note: Recent hemolysis modeling work reports 1926 peptides with experimentally determined HC50 against mammalian RBCs.
notes: Useful for auxiliary hemolysis regression/classification, not edit-pair data.

confidence_note: Manually curated AMP database with chemical structure, 3D structure, antimicrobial activity and hemolytic/cytotoxic activity fields.
notes: Potential source for hemolysis/cytotoxicity and modified peptide examples; requires strict assay-condition filtering.

confidence_note: Open AMP repository with general, patent and clinical entries; DRAMP 4.0 adds serum/protease stability and updates hemolytic/cytotoxic information.
notes: Auxiliary safety/stability labels; not a permeability dataset.

confidence_note: CAMP_R4 reports 24243 sequences, including 16945 experimentally validated entries and synthetic AMP coverage.
notes: Useful for synthetic peptide pretraining and activity/toxicity context; weak relevance to cyclic peptide permeability.

confidence_note: APD6 page reports 4928 peptides with demonstrated antimicrobial activity; APD includes hemolytic activity annotations.
notes: Auxiliary peptide property labels; mostly natural AMPs.

confidence_note: Updated dbAMP includes tools/annotations for hemolytic toxicity and half-life of AMPs.
notes: Auxiliary toxicity/stability labels after export availability check.

confidence_note: Structurally annotated therapeutic peptide database; paper reports 19192 unique experimentally validated peptide sequences of length 2-50, including natural, non-natural and modified residues.
notes: Good broad pretraining/annotation source, but labels are not permeability or matched edits.

confidence_note: FDA-approved therapeutic peptide/protein database; paper reports 852 entries covering 239 drugs and 380 variants.
notes: Useful for clinically relevant modification examples and route/PK metadata, not model training labels.

confidence_note: Manually curated database of approved peptide drugs and diagnostics with physicochemical, pharmacokinetic, indication and route information.
notes: Use for discussion/case studies and modification vocabulary; not high-throughput data.

confidence_note: Provides PDB/MOL2/SMILES and modeling parameters for hundreds of non-natural amino acid sidechains in L and D forms.
notes: High-value monomer_anchor_table and chemical_payload vocabulary source.

confidence_note: Pistoia HELM core monomer repository; pyPept paper notes the Pistoia set has 322 HELM monomers.
notes: Use as canonical monomer notation and attachment point reference.

confidence_note: NRP database with nonproteogenic amino acids, cyclic and branched peptide structures; current site says more than 1000 NRPs.
notes: Auxiliary natural product monomer/scaffold dictionary.

confidence_note: Knowledge base of 8744 natural and synthetic cyclic peptides with structural, physicochemical and pharmacokinetic-profile information.
notes: Good external cyclic peptide annotation source; inspect export fields before use.

confidence_note: Curated database of backbone-cyclized proteins; 2008 paper reported 251 protein sequences, 39 structures and activity-related entries.
notes: Useful for cyclic topology examples, not permeability.

confidence_note: Conopeptide database; paper reports 2258 protein sequences and PTM-aware displays.
notes: Useful for PTM vocabulary and disulfide-rich peptide structures, not permeability.

confidence_note: 3D structure knowledge base focused on cyclic peptides containing disulfide bonds.
notes: Potential external 3D/topology resource.

confidence_note: Dataset/workflows for reproducing experimental cyclic peptide and macrocycle solution structures; paper reports 68 structures.
notes: Use for 3D-risk/conformer benchmark, not property prediction.

confidence_note: Website states descriptors for 4602 unique macrocycles and complements CycPeptMPDB.
notes: External macrocycle permeability comparison, not peptide edit data.

confidence_note: General small-molecule ADME benchmark collection with PAMPA/Caco2 tasks.
notes: Use only for baseline methodology or transfer learning sanity checks; outside peptide chemistry.

confidence_note: Large heterogeneous bioactivity database with ADME assay records; requires heavy curation and unit normalization.
notes: Not first-wave source; consider later for macrocycle/small-molecule permeability baselines.

confidence_note: Used by peptide language-model papers as a large unlabeled peptide corpus.
notes: Unlabeled pretraining only; not directly useful for edit-level property labels.
